<uploaded_files>/app</uploaded_files>

# Incident write-up: financial-summary metrics disagree with source data at the margins

## Issue details

Several of the read-only routines that roll raw bank-feed, credit-bureau, and
accounting exports up into the structured metric blocks on the underwriting
surface are emitting figures that do not match their inputs - but only for a
narrow class of records. Every reproduction gathered so far sits on a margin of
some kind: a quantity landing exactly on a documented cut-off instead of
comfortably past it; a report handed over at the smallest column or period count
the format permits; a collection holding an even pair, so the count itself is
what decides the answer; and a field carrying one of the
reserved "nothing here" placeholder codes that is being echoed back as if it
were a genuine amount. Hand the same routines data sitting well inside the usual
ranges and the numbers come out right, which is why nothing stood out in review.

## Expected outcome

Each metric should agree with what the source record plainly says at these
margins. A value resting on a threshold is handled the way the documented rule
for that threshold states. The smallest well-formed report still yields its
per-period figures. A two-element collection is measured from its actual
contents rather than dismissed as too small. A
reserved placeholder code is discarded, never read as data. Everywhere away from
the margins the output must not move at all.

## Affected areas

The fault is contained in the deterministic, side-effect-free summarization
layer: plain arithmetic, comparisons, and roll-ups over already-parsed bank,
credit, and accounting structures. No database, network, or model component is
in the loop. Each wrong figure traces to how one boundary - or one reserved
value - is treated inside that computation, so the corrections are small and
local.

## Testing notes

The existing automated checks all pass today and must still pass afterward; they
only ever drive mid-range inputs, so they are silent about the margins described
above. Judge the fix on whether the summaries come out correct on the
exact-threshold, minimum-size, single/pair, and placeholder-code cases. Do not
touch anything under the project's `tests` tree.

Reproduce and confirm with:

    cd /app/loangen-agent && python -m pytest tests -v
I’ll trace the deterministic summarization code paths for bank, credit, and accounting metrics, identify the boundary/placeholder cases, then make the smallest local fixes without touching `tests`.

todos.content: Locate financial summary metric roll-up code and relevant boundary logic
Patch local boundary and placeholder handling bugs
Run existing test suite with python -m pytest tests -v

214: class CreditBureauService:
215:     """
216:     Fetches credit bureau data. In dev mode, returns mock data.
217:     In production, calls real bureau APIs.
218: 
219:     Data is returned as pre-processed dicts — the LLM receives
220:     these structured summaries, never raw bureau XML/JSON.
221:     """
222: 
223:     async def get_reports(self, company_id: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
224:         personal = MOCK_PERSONAL_CREDIT.get(company_id)
225:         business = MOCK_BUSINESS_CREDIT.get(company_id)
226: 
227:         if not personal and not business:
228:             logger.warning(f"No credit data for company {company_id}")
229:             return None
230: 
231:         return {
232:             "personal": personal,
233:             "business": business,
234:         }
235: 
236:     async def get_fico_score(self, company_id: str) -> int | None:
237:         personal = MOCK_PERSONAL_CREDIT.get(company_id)
238:         return personal["fico_score"] if personal else None

1: """
2: Qualification Engine — Deterministic loan qualification logic.
3: 
4: This is the AUTHORITATIVE qualification engine. It computes qualification
5: results against a list of loan products (from DB). Products are passed in;
6: no hardcoded product list.
7: """
8: 
9: import logging
10: from datetime import datetime
11: from typing import Any
12: 
13: logger = logging.getLogger("loangen-qualification")
14: 
15: 
16: def _safe_num(v: Any) -> float:
17:     """Coerce to float for use in sums; None or invalid -> 0."""
18:     if v is None:
19:         return 0.0
20:     try:
21:         return float(v)
22:     except (TypeError, ValueError):
23:         return 0.0
24: 
25: 
26: def compute_dscr(
27:     net_income: float,
28:     monthly_debt_payments: float,
29: ) -> float:
30:     """Deterministic DSCR computation. Used as ground truth, not the LLM."""
31:     monthly_income = net_income / 12
32:     if monthly_debt_payments <= 0:
33:         return 99.0
34:     return round(monthly_income / monthly_debt_payments, 2)
35: 
36: 
37: class QualificationEngine:
38:     """
39:     Deterministic qualification logic. Computes exact pass/fail against
40:     each loan product's criteria and identifies specific gaps.
41: 
42:     The LLM receives these results as structured context and reasons
43:     over them — it does NOT perform the qualification math.
44:     """
45: 
46:     def qualify(
47:         self,
48:         context: dict[str, Any],
49:         products: list[dict[str, Any]],
50:         desired_loan_type: str = "general",
51:         desired_amount: float = 0,
52:     ) -> dict[str, dict[str, Any]]:
53:         """
54:         Qualify the SMB against the given loan products. Returns a dict mapping
55:         product id -> qualification result (qualifies, gaps, match_score, etc.).
56:         products: list of dicts with id, name, category, min_amount, max_amount,
57:                   rate_range, term_months, criteria (min_credit_score, min_dscr, ...).
58:         """
59:         results: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = {}
60: 
61:         company = context.get("company") or {}
62:         financials = context.get("financials") or {}
63:         personal_credit = context.get("credit_personal") or {}
64:         bank = context.get("bank_data") or {}
65:         cash_flow = bank.get("cash_flow_analysis") or {}
66: 
67:         fico = personal_credit.get("fico_score", 0)
68:         revenue = financials.get("revenue", 0)
69:         _now_year = datetime.now().year
70:         try:
71:             year_est = company.get("year_established")
72:             year_est = _now_year if year_est is None else int(year_est)
73:         except (TypeError, ValueError):
74:             year_est = _now_year
75:         years_in_biz = _now_year - year_est
76:         d_to_e = financials.get("debt_to_equity", 0)
77:         net_income = financials.get("net_income", 0)
78: 
79:         monthly_debt = sum(
80:             _safe_num(t.get("monthly_payment"))
81:             for t in personal_credit.get("tradelines", [])
82:             if t.get("status") != "closed"
83:         )
84:         property_dscr = financials.get("property_dscr") or financials.get("dscr")
85:         if property_dscr is not None and float(property_dscr) > 0:
86:             dscr = round(float(property_dscr), 2)
87:         else:
88:             dscr = compute_dscr(net_income, monthly_debt)
89: 
90:         for product in products:
91:             crit = product.get("criteria") or {}
92:             pid = str(product.get("id", ""))
93:             if not pid:
94:                 continue
95:             gaps: list[str] = []
96:             passed = True
97: 
98:             if fico < crit.get("min_credit_score", 0):
99:                 passed = False
100:                 gaps.append(
101:                     f"Credit score {fico} below minimum {crit['min_credit_score']} "
102:                     f"(gap: {crit['min_credit_score'] - fico} points)"
103:                 )
104: 
105:             if revenue < crit.get("min_annual_revenue", 0):
106:                 passed = False
107:                 gaps.append(
108:                     f"Annual revenue ${revenue:,.0f} below minimum ${crit['min_annual_revenue']:,.0f} "
109:                     f"(gap: ${crit['min_annual_revenue'] - revenue:,.0f})"
110:                 )
111: 
112:             if years_in_biz < crit.get("min_years_in_business", 0):
113:                 passed = False
114:                 gaps.append(
115:                     f"Time in business {years_in_biz}yr below minimum {crit['min_years_in_business']}yr"
116:                 )
117: 
118:             if crit.get("min_dscr") is not None and dscr < crit["min_dscr"]:
119:                 passed = False
120:                 gaps.append(
121:                     f"DSCR {dscr} below minimum {crit['min_dscr']} "
122:                     f"(gap: {crit['min_dscr'] - dscr:.2f})"
123:                 )
124: 
125:             if crit.get("max_debt_to_equity") is not None and d_to_e > crit["max_debt_to_equity"]:
126:                 passed = False
127:                 gaps.append(
128:                     f"Debt-to-equity {d_to_e:.2f} exceeds maximum {crit['max_debt_to_equity']}"
129:                 )
130: 
131:             amount_ok = True
132:             min_amt = product.get("min_amount", 0)
133:             max_amt = product.get("max_amount", 0)
134:             if desired_amount > 0:
135:                 if desired_amount < min_amt or desired_amount > max_amt:
136:                     amount_ok = False
137:                     gaps.append(
138:                         f"Requested ${desired_amount:,.0f} outside range "
139:                         f"${min_amt:,.0f}-${max_amt:,.0f}"
140:                     )
141: 
142:             max_qualified = min(revenue * 0.30, max_amt) if passed else 0
143: 
144:             score = 100
145:             if not passed:
146:                 score = max(0, 100 - len(gaps) * 20)
147: 
148:             results[pid] = {
149:                 "product_id": pid,
150:                 "product_name": product.get("name", ""),
151:                 "qualifies": passed and amount_ok,
152:                 "gaps": gaps,
153:                 "match_score": score,
154:                 "max_qualified_amount": max_qualified,
155:                 "rate_range": product.get("rate_range") or {"min": 0, "max": 0},
156:                 "term_range": product.get("term_months") or {"min": 0, "max": 0},
157:                 "dscr": dscr,
158:             }
159: 
160:         return results

<content>
1: """
2: Prequalification service — compute FICO, revenue, DSCR, years in biz, D/E from
3: live analytics, persist a snapshot with timestamp, and run product qualification.
4: """
5: from __future__ import annotations
6: 
7: import logging
8: import math
9: from datetime import datetime, timezone
10: from typing import Any, Optional
11: 
12: from agent.analytics.services.credit_bureau_analytics import CreditBureauAnalyticsService
13: from agent.analytics.services.quickbooks_analytics import QuickBooksAnalyticsService
14: from agent.services.prequal.models import PrequalSnapshot
15: from agent.services.prequal.readiness_config import DEFAULT_READINESS_RULES, ReadinessConfig
16: from agent.services.loanproducts.service import get_all_catalog_products, loan_product_to_engine_dict
17: from agent.services.prequal.schemas import (
18:     PrequalMetricsResponse,
19:     PrequalProductResult,
20:     PrequalResponse,
21:     RateRangeSchema,
22:     ReadinessBreakdown,
23:     ReadinessFactor,
24: )
25: from agent.tools.qualification_engine import QualificationEngine
26: 
27: logger = logging.getLogger("loangen.prequal")
28: 
29: 
30: def _years_from_start_date(start_date: Optional[str]) -> Optional[float]:
31:     """Compute years in business from QB company start_date (e.g. '2015-03-15')."""
32:     if not start_date or len(start_date) < 4:
33:         return None
34:     try:
35:         year = int(start_date[:4])
36:         current_year = datetime.now(timezone.utc).year
37:         return float(max(0, current_year - year))
38:     except (ValueError, TypeError):
39:         return None
40: 
41: 
42: async def compute_and_cache_prequal(smb_id: str, live: bool) -> PrequalSnapshot:
43:     """
44:     Fetch live credit and QB analytics, compute the five key metrics,
45:     persist a PrequalSnapshot with generated_at, and return it.
46:     """
47:     credit_svc = CreditBureauAnalyticsService(live=live)
48:     qb_svc = QuickBooksAnalyticsService(live=live)
49: 
50:     fico_score: Optional[int] = None
51:     annual_revenue: Optional[float] = None
52:     dscr: Optional[float] = None
53:     years_in_business: Optional[float] = None
54:     debt_to_equity: Optional[float] = None
55:     net_income: Optional[float] = None
56:     company_start_date: Optional[str] = None
57:     revenue_growth_yoy: Optional[float] = None
58:     cash_on_hand: Optional[float] = None
59:     runway_months: Optional[float] = None
60:     monthly_burn: Optional[float] = None
61:     total_equity: Optional[float] = None
62:     total_liabilities: Optional[float] = None
63: 
64:     credit_result = await credit_svc.get_analytics(smb_id)
65:     if credit_result:
66:         fico_score = credit_result.credit_score
67: 
68:     qb_result = await qb_svc.get_analytics(smb_id)
69:     if qb_result:
70:         annual_revenue = qb_result.revenue
71:         debt_to_equity = qb_result.debt_to_equity
72:         net_income = qb_result.net_income
73:         dscr = qb_result.dscr
74:         company_start_date = qb_result.company.start_date or ""
75:         years_in_business = _years_from_start_date(company_start_date)
76:         revenue_growth_yoy = qb_result.revenue_growth_yoy
77:         cash_on_hand = qb_result.cash_on_hand
78:         runway_months = qb_result.runway_months
79:         # Store raw burn/equity/liabilities so _compute_readiness can apply
80:         # correct guards (zero-equity trap, unreliable-runway detection).
81:         monthly_burn = qb_result.monthly_burn_rate if qb_result.monthly_burn_rate else None
82:         total_equity = qb_result.equity          # can be negative
83:         total_liabilities = qb_result.total_liabilities if qb_result.total_liabilities >= 0 else None
84: 
85:     generated_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
86: 
87:     snapshot = PrequalSnapshot(
88:         smb_id=smb_id,
89:         generated_at=generated_at,
90:         fico_score=fico_score,
91:         annual_revenue=annual_revenue,
92:         dscr=dscr,
93:         years_in_business=years_in_business,
94:         debt_to_equity=debt_to_equity,
95:         net_income=net_income,
96:         company_start_date=company_start_date,
97:         revenue_growth_yoy=revenue_growth_yoy,
98:         cash_on_hand=cash_on_hand,
99:         runway_months=runway_months,
100:         monthly_burn=monthly_burn,
101:         total_equity=total_equity,
102:         total_liabilities=total_liabilities,
103:     )
104:     await snapshot.insert()
105:     logger.info(
106:         f"Prequal snapshot saved smb_id={smb_id} generated_at={generated_at.isoformat()} "
107:         f"fico={fico_score} revenue={annual_revenue} dscr={dscr} yib={years_in_business} dte={debt_to_equity}"
108:     )
109:     return snapshot
110: 
111: 
112: def _build_qualification_context(snapshot: PrequalSnapshot) -> dict[str, Any]:
113:     """Build context dict expected by QualificationEngine.qualify()."""
114:     year_est = datetime.now(timezone.utc).year
115:     if snapshot.years_in_business is not None:
116:         year_est = int(datetime.now(timezone.utc).year - snapshot.years_in_business)
117: 
118:     return {
119:         "company": {"year_established": year_est},
120:         "financials": {
121:             "revenue": snapshot.annual_revenue or 0,
122:             "net_income": snapshot.net_income or 0,
123:             "debt_to_equity": snapshot.debt_to_equity or 0,
124:         },
125:         "credit_personal": {
126:             "fico_score": snapshot.fico_score or 0,
127:             "tradelines": [],
128:         },
129:         "bank_data": {},
130:     }
131: 
132: 
133: async def _run_qualification(snapshot: PrequalSnapshot) -> tuple[list, list, list]:
134:     """
135:     Load loan products from DB, run QualificationEngine.qualify(), and return
136:     (qualified, partial, not_qualified) as lists of PrequalProductResult with display fields.
137:     """
138:     products_doc = await get_all_catalog_products()
139:     if not products_doc:
140:         return [], [], []
141: 
142:     products = [loan_product_to_engine_dict(p) for p in products_doc]
143:     context = _build_qualification_context(snapshot)
144:     engine = QualificationEngine()
145:     results_map = engine.qualify(context, products, desired_loan_type="general", desired_amount=0)
146: 
147:     qualified: list[PrequalProductResult] = []
148:     partial: list[PrequalProductResult] = []
149:     not_qualified: list[PrequalProductResult] = []
150: 
151:     for product in products_doc:
152:         pid = str(product.id)
153:         res = results_map.get(pid)
154:         if not res:
155:             continue
156:         rate_range = (
157:             RateRangeSchema(min=product.typical_rate_range.min, max=product.typical_rate_range.max)
158:             if product.typical_rate_range
159:             else None
160:         )
161:         entry = PrequalProductResult(
162:             product_id=pid,
163:             product_name=product.name,
164:             category=product.category,
165:             qualified=res.get("qualifies", False),
166:             match_score=int(res.get("match_score", 0)),
167:             gaps=res.get("gaps", []),
168:             description=product.description or None,
169:             min_amount=product.min_amount,
170:             max_amount=product.max_amount,
171:             typical_rate_range=rate_range,
172:             avg_approval_days=product.avg_approval_days,
173:             pros=product.pros or [],
174:             cons=product.cons or [],
175:         )
176:         if entry.qualified:
177:             qualified.append(entry)
178:         elif entry.match_score >= 60:
179:             partial.append(entry)
180:         else:
181:             not_qualified.append(entry)
182: 
183:     return qualified, partial, not_qualified
184: 
185: 
186: async def get_readiness_config() -> ReadinessConfig | None:
187:     """Load readiness scoring config from DB. Seeds default if missing. Returns None if DB unavailable."""
188:     try:
189:         config = await ReadinessConfig.find_one(ReadinessConfig.config_id == "default")
190:         if config is None:
191:             config = ReadinessConfig(
192:                 config_id="default",
193:                 revenue_strength=DEFAULT_READINESS_RULES["revenue_strength"],
194:                 profitability=DEFAULT_READINESS_RULES["profitability"],
195:                 cash_position=DEFAULT_READINESS_RULES["cash_position"],
196:                 debt_profile=DEFAULT_READINESS_RULES["debt_profile"],
197:                 business_maturity=DEFAULT_READINESS_RULES["business_maturity"],
198:                 level_thresholds=DEFAULT_READINESS_RULES["level_thresholds"],
199:                 status_strong_min=DEFAULT_READINESS_RULES["status_strong_min"],
200:                 status_moderate_min=DEFAULT_READINESS_RULES["status_moderate_min"],
201:             )
202:             await config.insert()
203:             logger.info("Readiness config seeded (config_id=default)")
204:         return config
205:     except Exception as e:
206:         logger.warning(f"Could not load readiness config from DB: {e}")
207:         return None
208: 
209: 
210: def _score_from_tiers_revenue(tiers: list, value: float) -> int:
211:     """First tier where value >= min_revenue (tiers ordered desc by min_revenue)."""
212:     for t in sorted(tiers, key=lambda x: x.get("min_revenue", 0), reverse=True):
213:         if value >= t.get("min_revenue", 0):
214:             return int(t.get("score", 0))
215:     return 0
216: 
217: 
218: def _score_from_tiers_margin(tiers: list, value: float) -> int:
219:     """First tier where value >= min_margin (tiers ordered desc by min_margin)."""
220:     for t in sorted(tiers, key=lambda x: x.get("min_margin", -999), reverse=True):
221:         if value >= t.get("min_margin", -999):
222:             return int(t.get("score", 0))
223:     return 0
224: 
225: 
226: def _score_from_tiers_runway(tiers: list, value: float) -> int:
227:     """First tier where value >= min_runway (tiers ordered desc by min_runway)."""
228:     for t in sorted(tiers, key=lambda x: x.get("min_runway", 0), reverse=True):
229:         if value >= t.get("min_runway", 0):
230:             return int(t.get("score", 0))
231:     return 0
232: 
233: 
234: def _compute_readiness(snapshot: PrequalSnapshot, config: ReadinessConfig) -> ReadinessBreakdown | None:
235:     """
236:     Compute Readiness Score Breakdown from snapshot using DB-backed config only.
237: 
238:     Returns None only when there is no QB data at all (revenue, cash, and
239:     years_in_business are all None).  A zero-revenue or cash-only business still
240:     gets a scored breakdown — those factors simply score 0 while others can
241:     reflect genuine strength.
242: 
243:     Key guardrails applied here (not in config):
244:     - Profitability: denominator guard — never divides by zero/missing revenue.
245:     - Cash Position: runway is trusted only when monthly_burn > 0; a cash floor
246:       of cash_only_min_cash (default $1 000) is required for the cash-only
247:       fallback points.
248:     - Debt Profile: missing balance-sheet data → weak (score 0); zero equity
249:       with outstanding debt → extreme leverage (score 5, not strong).
250:     - Revenue growth bonus: guarded so it never fires at $0 revenue.
251:     """
252:     # Require at least some QB data before showing any breakdown.
253:     if (
254:         snapshot.annual_revenue is None
255:         and snapshot.cash_on_hand is None
256:         and snapshot.years_in_business is None
257:     ):
258:         return None
259: 
260:     factors: list[ReadinessFactor] = []
261:     total_score = 0
262:     total_max = 0
263: 
264:     rs = config.revenue_strength or {}
265:     prof = config.profitability or {}
266:     cp = config.cash_position or {}
267:     dp = config.debt_profile or {}
268:     bm = config.business_maturity or {}
269:     levels = config.level_thresholds or {}
270:     strong_min = getattr(config, "status_strong_min", 14)
271:     mod_min = getattr(config, "status_moderate_min", 8)
272: 
273:     def _status(score: int, strong_cutoff: int, moderate_cutoff: int) -> str:
274:         if score >= strong_cutoff:
275:             return "strong"
276:         if score >= moderate_cutoff:
277:             return "moderate"
278:         return "weak"
279: 
280:     # ── 1. Revenue Strength (max 20) ─────────────────────────────────────────
281:     rev_max = int(rs.get("max_score", 20))
282:     revenue = max(0.0, snapshot.annual_revenue or 0.0)
283:     growth = snapshot.revenue_growth_yoy or 0.0
284: 
285:     rev_score = _score_from_tiers_revenue(rs.get("revenue_tiers", []), revenue)
286: 
287:     growth_bonus = 0
288:     if revenue > 0 and growth > 0:
289:         cap = int(rs.get("growth_bonus_cap", 4))
290:         growth_bonus = min(cap, int(growth / 5) + 1) if growth >= 5 else 1
291: 
292:     rev_score = min(rev_max, rev_score + growth_bonus)
293: 
294:     if revenue >= 1_000_000:
295:         rev_insight = f"${revenue / 1_000_000:.2f}M revenue"
296:     elif revenue > 0:
297:         rev_insight = f"${revenue / 1_000:.0f}K revenue"
298:     else:
299:         rev_insight = "No revenue reported"
300:     if revenue > 0 and growth > 0:
301:         rev_insight += f", {growth:.1f}% YoY growth"
302: 
303:     rev_status = _status(rev_score, strong_min, mod_min)
304:     factors.append(ReadinessFactor(name="Revenue Strength", score=rev_score, max_score=rev_max, insight=rev_insight, status=rev_status))
305:     total_score += rev_score
306:     total_max += rev_max
307: 
308:     # ── 2. Profitability (max 20) ─────────────────────────────────────────────
309:     prof_max = int(prof.get("max_score", 20))
310: 
311:     if snapshot.annual_revenue is None or snapshot.annual_revenue <= 0:
312:         # Denominator guard: never compute margin on zero/missing revenue.
313:         prof_score = 0
314:         prof_insight = "Revenue data unavailable — cannot compute margin"
315:     else:
316:         net = snapshot.net_income if snapshot.net_income is not None else 0.0
317:         margin = (net / snapshot.annual_revenue) * 100
318:         prof_score = _score_from_tiers_margin(prof.get("margin_tiers", []), margin)
319:         if margin >= 15:
320:             prof_insight = f"{margin:.1f}% profit margin — strong"
321:         elif margin > 0:
322:             prof_insight = f"{margin:.1f}% profit margin"
323:         else:
324:             prof_insight = "No profit or loss reported"
325: 
326:     prof_status = _status(prof_score, strong_min, mod_min)
327:     factors.append(ReadinessFactor(name="Profitability", score=prof_score, max_score=prof_max, insight=prof_insight, status=prof_status))
328:     total_score += prof_score
329:     total_max += prof_max
330: 
331:     # ── 3. Cash Position (max 15) ─────────────────────────────────────────────
332:     cash_max = int(cp.get("max_score", 15))
333:     cash = snapshot.cash_on_hand or 0.0
334:     runway = snapshot.runway_months or 0.0
335:     burn = snapshot.monthly_burn or 0.0
336:     score_cash_only = int(cp.get("score_when_cash_only", 5))
337:     cash_only_min = float(cp.get("cash_only_min_cash", 1_000.0))
338: 
339:     # Runway is only trustworthy when burn > 0 (avoids infinite-runway from near-zero burn).
340:     runway_valid = (
341:         snapshot.runway_months is not None
342:         and math.isfinite(runway)
343:         and runway >= 0
344:         and snapshot.monthly_burn is not None
345:         and burn > 0
346:     )
347: 
348:     if cash <= 0:
349:         cash_score = 0
350:         cash_insight = "No cash balance reported"
351:     elif runway_valid and runway >= 1:
352:         cash_score = _score_from_tiers_runway(cp.get("runway_tiers", []), runway)
353:         if runway >= 6:
354:             cash_insight = f"${cash:,.0f} cash, {runway:.1f} months runway"
355:         else:
356:             cash_insight = f"${cash:,.0f} cash, {runway:.1f} mo runway"
357:     elif cash >= cash_only_min:
358:         # Cash present but runway unreliable — award partial credit only above floor.
359:         cash_score = score_cash_only
360:         cash_insight = f"${cash:,.0f} cash on hand"
361:     else:
362:         # Cash is below the meaningful floor.
363:         cash_score = 0
364:         cash_insight = f"${cash:,.0f} cash — below minimum threshold"
365: 
366:     cash_status = _status(cash_score, 12, 6)
367:     factors.append(ReadinessFactor(name="Cash Position", score=cash_score, max_score=cash_max, insight=cash_insight, status=cash_status))
368:     total_score += cash_score
369:     total_max += cash_max
370: 
371:     # ── 4. Debt Profile (max 15) ─────────────────────────────────────────────
372:     debt_max = int(dp.get("max_score", 15))
373:     dte_unknown = int(dp.get("dte_unknown_score", 0))   # default 0 — unknown is weak
374:     dte_negative = int(dp.get("dte_negative_score", 3))
375:     dte_tiers = dp.get("dte_tiers", [])
376: 
377:     raw_liabilities = snapshot.total_liabilities
378:     raw_equity = snapshot.total_equity
379: 
380:     if raw_liabilities is None or raw_equity is None:
381:         # No balance sheet data at all.
382:         debt_score = dte_unknown
383:         debt_insight = "Balance sheet data not available"
384:     elif raw_equity < 0:
385:         # Negative equity — liabilities exceed assets.
386:         debt_score = dte_negative
387:         dte_val = round(raw_liabilities / raw_equity, 2) if raw_equity != 0 else 0.0
388:         debt_insight = f"D/E {dte_val:.2f} (negative equity)"
389:     elif raw_equity == 0:
390:         # Zero equity — extreme leverage if debt is present, otherwise unknown.
391:         if raw_liabilities > 0:
392:             debt_score = 5
393:             debt_insight = "Zero equity with outstanding debt — extreme leverage"
394:         else:
395:             debt_score = dte_unknown
396:             debt_insight = "No equity or liabilities on record"
397:     else:
398:         dte_val = raw_liabilities / raw_equity
399:         debt_score = 5  # floor (> max_dte tier fallback)
400:         for t in sorted(dte_tiers, key=lambda x: x.get("max_dte", 999)):
401:             if dte_val <= t.get("max_dte", 999):
402:                 debt_score = int(t.get("score", 5))
403:                 break
404:         if dte_val <= 1.0:
405:             debt_insight = f"D/E {dte_val:.2f} — conservative leverage"
406:         else:
407:             debt_insight = f"D/E {dte_val:.2f}"
408: 
409:     debt_status = _status(debt_score, 12, 8)
410:     factors.append(ReadinessFactor(name="Debt Profile", score=debt_score, max_score=debt_max, insight=debt_insight, status=debt_status))
411:     total_score += debt_score
412:     total_max += debt_max
413: 
414:     # ── 5. Business Maturity (max 15) ─────────────────────────────────────────
415:     mat_max = int(bm.get("max_score", 15))
416:     yib = snapshot.years_in_business
417:     yib_unknown = int(bm.get("yib_unknown_score", 5))
418:     yib_tiers = bm.get("yib_tiers", [])
419: 
420:     if yib is None:
421:         mat_score = yib_unknown
422:         mat_insight = "Years in business unknown"
423:     else:
424:         mat_score = 0
425:         for t in sorted(yib_tiers, key=lambda x: x.get("min_years", -1), reverse=True):
426:             if yib >= t.get("min_years", -1):
427:                 mat_score = int(t.get("score", 0))
428:                 break
429:         if yib >= 1:
430:             mat_insight = f"{int(yib)} years in business"
431:         elif yib > 0:
432:             mat_insight = f"{yib:.1f} years in business"
433:         else:
434:             mat_insight = "Less than 1 year in business"
435: 
436:     mat_status = _status(mat_score, 12, 6)
437:     factors.append(ReadinessFactor(name="Business Maturity", score=mat_score, max_score=mat_max, insight=mat_insight, status=mat_status))
438:     total_score += mat_score
439:     total_max += mat_max

441:     # ── Overall (0–100 normalised against fixed RAW_MAX) ─────────────────────
442:     # RAW_MAX is fixed at 85 (20+20+15+15+15) so the overall is always on the
443:     # same scale regardless of individual factor scores.
444:     RAW_MAX = 85.0
445:     overall = round((total_score / RAW_MAX) * 100)
446:     overall = min(100, max(0, overall))
447: 
448:     excellent = levels.get("excellent", 75)
449:     good = levels.get("good", 55)
450:     fair = levels.get("fair", 35)
451:     if overall >= excellent:
452:         level = "Excellent"
453:     elif overall >= good:
454:         level = "Good"
455:     elif overall >= fair:
456:         level = "Fair"
457:     else:
458:         level = "Needs Work"
459: 
460:     return ReadinessBreakdown(overall=overall, factors=factors, readiness_level=level)

463: async def snapshot_to_response(snapshot: PrequalSnapshot) -> PrequalResponse:
464:     """Convert a PrequalSnapshot to PrequalResponse and run product qualification. Readiness uses config from DB."""
465:     metrics = PrequalMetricsResponse(
466:         fico_score=snapshot.fico_score,
467:         annual_revenue=snapshot.annual_revenue,
468:         dscr=snapshot.dscr,
469:         years_in_business=snapshot.years_in_business,
470:         company_start_date=snapshot.company_start_date,
471:         debt_to_equity=snapshot.debt_to_equity,
472:     )
473:     qualified, partial, not_qualified = await _run_qualification(snapshot)
474:     config = await get_readiness_config()
475:     readiness = _compute_readiness(snapshot, config) if config else None
476:     return PrequalResponse(
477:         smb_id=snapshot.smb_id,
478:         generated_at=snapshot.generated_at,
479:         metrics=metrics,
480:         qualified_products=qualified,
481:         partial_products=partial,
482:         not_qualified_products=not_qualified,
483:         readiness=readiness,
484:     )
485: 
486: 
487: async def get_latest_snapshot(smb_id: str) -> Optional[PrequalSnapshot]:
488:     """Return the most recent PrequalSnapshot for the given smb_id, or None."""
489:     return (
490:         await PrequalSnapshot.find(PrequalSnapshot.smb_id == smb_id)
491:         .sort("-generated_at")
492:         .first_or_none()
493:     )
494:

496: async def invalidate_prequal_cache(smb_id: str) -> None:
497:     """Delete all PrequalSnapshot documents for the given smb_id. Call after QB sync so next prequal uses fresh data."""
498:     result = await PrequalSnapshot.find(PrequalSnapshot.smb_id == smb_id).delete()
499:     count = result.deleted_count if hasattr(result, "deleted_count") else 0
500:     logger.info(f"Prequal cache invalidated for smb_id={smb_id} (deleted {count} snapshot(s)).")

1: """
2: QuickBooks Analytics Service.
3: 
4: Parses raw QuickBooks Online API v3 report JSONs from MongoDB and computes
5: all financial metrics needed by the dashboard.
6: 
7: QB reports use a deeply nested structure:
8:   Rows.Row[] → each is a Section with Header/Rows/Summary/ColData.
9: 
10: This service navigates that structure to extract every number the UI needs.
11: 
12: Uses Beanie ODM (not raw Motor) for all database queries — consistent
13: with the project-wide database pattern in agent.core.database.
14: """
15: from __future__ import annotations
16: 
17: import logging
18: import statistics
19: from typing import Any, Callable, Optional
20: 
21: from agent.analytics.models.quickbooks import (
22:     AgingBucket,
23:     AgingData,
24:     BalanceSheetData,
25:     CashFlowData,
26:     CompanyProfile,
27:     IncomeStatement,
28:     IncomeStatementLine,
29:     QBAnalyticsResult,
30:     QBReportDocument,
31:     SeasonalityAnalysis,
32: )
33: 
34: logger = logging.getLogger("loangen-qb-analytics")
35: 
36: # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
37: # QB JSON navigation helpers
38: # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
39: 
40: 
41: def _safe_float(val: str | None) -> float:
42:     if not val:
43:         return 0.0
44:     try:
45:         return float(val.replace(",", ""))
46:     except (ValueError, TypeError):
47:         return 0.0
48: 
49: 
50: def _get_coldata_values(col_data: list[dict]) -> list[str]:
51:     return [cd.get("value", "") for cd in col_data]
52: 
53: 
54: def _find_section(rows: list[dict], group: str) -> dict | None:
55:     for row in rows:
56:         if row.get("group") == group:
57:             return row
58:         inner = row.get("Rows", {}).get("Row", [])
59:         if inner:
60:             found = _find_section(inner, group)
61:             if found:
62:                 return found
63:     return None
64: 
65: 
66: def _find_summary_value(rows: list[dict], group: str, col_index: int = -1) -> float:
67:     section = _find_section(rows, group)
68:     if not section:
69:         return 0.0
70:     summary = section.get("Summary", {})
71:     col_data = summary.get("ColData", [])
72:     if not col_data:
73:         return 0.0
74:     idx = col_index if col_index >= 0 else len(col_data) - 1
75:     return _safe_float(col_data[idx].get("value", "0"))
76: 
77: 
78: def _extract_monthly_from_summary(section: dict | None, num_months: int) -> list[float]:
79:     if not section:
80:         return []
81:     summary = section.get("Summary", {})
82:     col_data = summary.get("ColData", [])
83:     if len(col_data) <= num_months + 2:
84:         return []
85:     return [_safe_float(col_data[i].get("value", "0")) for i in range(1, num_months + 1)]
86: 
87: 
88: def _extract_data_rows(section: dict | None) -> list[dict]:
89:     if not section:
90:         return []
91:     inner_rows = section.get("Rows", {}).get("Row", [])
92:     return [r for r in inner_rows if r.get("type") == "Data"]
93: 
94: 
95: def _row_to_line_item(row: dict, num_months: int) -> IncomeStatementLine:
96:     col_data = row.get("ColData", [])
97:     values = _get_coldata_values(col_data)
98:     name = values[0] if values else ""
99:     account_id = col_data[0].get("id", "") if col_data else ""
100:     total = _safe_float(values[-1]) if values else 0
101: 
102:     monthly = []
103:     if len(values) >= num_months + 2:
104:         monthly = [_safe_float(values[i]) for i in range(1, num_months + 1)]
105: 
106:     return IncomeStatementLine(
107:         name=name,
108:         account_id=account_id,
109:         total=total,
110:         monthly=monthly,
111:     )
112: 
113: 
114: # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
115: # Report parsers
116: # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
117: 
118: 
119: def parse_profit_and_loss(raw: dict[str, Any]) -> IncomeStatement:
120:     header = raw.get("Header", {})
121:     columns = raw.get("Columns", {}).get("Column", [])
122:     rows = raw.get("Rows", {}).get("Row", [])
123: 
124:     month_cols = [c for c in columns if c.get("ColType") == "Money" and c.get("ColTitle", "") != "TOTAL"]
125:     num_months = len(month_cols)
126:     month_names = [c.get("ColTitle", "") for c in month_cols]
127: 
128:     income_section = _find_section(rows, "Income")
129:     cogs_section = _find_section(rows, "COGS")
130:     expense_section = _find_section(rows, "Expenses")
131: 
132:     income_lines = [_row_to_line_item(r, num_months) for r in _extract_data_rows(income_section)]
133:     cogs_lines = [_row_to_line_item(r, num_months) for r in _extract_data_rows(cogs_section)]
134:     expense_lines = [_row_to_line_item(r, num_months) for r in _extract_data_rows(expense_section)]
135: 
136:     total_income = _find_summary_value(rows, "Income")
137:     total_cogs = _find_summary_value(rows, "COGS")
138:     gross_profit = _find_summary_value(rows, "GrossProfit")
139:     total_expenses = _find_summary_value(rows, "Expenses")
140:     net_op_income = _find_summary_value(rows, "NetOperatingIncome")
141:     other_income = _find_summary_value(rows, "OtherIncome")
142:     net_income = _find_summary_value(rows, "NetIncome")
143: 
144:     monthly_income = _extract_monthly_from_summary(income_section, num_months)
145: 
146:     gross_margin = round((gross_profit / total_income * 100), 1) if total_income else 0
147:     profit_margin = round((net_income / total_income * 100), 1) if total_income else 0
148: 
149:     return IncomeStatement(
150:         period=f"{header.get('StartPeriod', '')} to {header.get('EndPeriod', '')}",
151:         start_date=header.get("StartPeriod", ""),
152:         end_date=header.get("EndPeriod", ""),
153:         months=month_names,
154:         income_lines=income_lines,
155:         total_income=total_income,
156:         monthly_income=monthly_income,
157:         cogs_lines=cogs_lines,
158:         total_cogs=total_cogs,
159:         gross_profit=gross_profit,
160:         gross_margin_pct=gross_margin,
161:         expense_lines=expense_lines,
162:         total_expenses=total_expenses,
163:         net_operating_income=net_op_income,
164:         other_income=other_income,
165:         net_income=net_income,
166:         profit_margin_pct=profit_margin,
167:     )
168: 
169: 
170: def parse_balance_sheet(raw: dict[str, Any]) -> BalanceSheetData:
171:     rows = raw.get("Rows", {}).get("Row", [])
172:     header = raw.get("Header", {})
173: 
174:     def _find_nested_value(rows_list: list, label_contains: str) -> float:
175:         for row in rows_list:
176:             if row.get("type") == "Data":
177:                 cd = row.get("ColData", [])
178:                 if cd and label_contains.lower() in cd[0].get("value", "").lower():
179:                     return _safe_float(cd[-1].get("value", "0"))
180:             inner = row.get("Rows", {}).get("Row", [])
181:             if inner:
182:                 val = _find_nested_value(inner, label_contains)
183:                 if val != 0:
184:                     return val
185:         return 0.0
186: 
187:     def _find_nested_summary(rows_list: list, label_contains: str) -> float:
188:         for row in rows_list:
189:             summary = row.get("Summary", {})
190:             if summary:
191:                 cd = summary.get("ColData", [])
192:                 if cd and label_contains.lower() in cd[0].get("value", "").lower():
193:                     return _safe_float(cd[-1].get("value", "0"))
194:             inner = row.get("Rows", {}).get("Row", [])
195:             if inner:
196:                 val = _find_nested_summary(inner, label_contains)
197:                 if val != 0:
198:                     return val
199:         return 0.0
200: 
201:     total_assets = _find_summary_value(rows, "TotalAssets") or _find_nested_summary(rows, "TOTAL ASSETS")
202:     total_liabilities = _find_summary_value(rows, "TotalLiabilities") or _find_nested_summary(rows, "Total Liabilities")
203:     total_equity = _find_summary_value(rows, "TotalEquity") or _find_nested_summary(rows, "Total Equity")
204: 
205:     cash = _find_nested_summary(rows, "Total Bank Accounts")
206:     ar = _find_nested_summary(rows, "Total Accounts Receivable")
207:     ap = _find_nested_value(rows, "Accounts Payable (A/P)")
208:     total_current_assets = _find_nested_summary(rows, "Total Current Assets")
209:     total_current_liabilities = _find_nested_summary(rows, "Total Current Liabilities")
210:     total_fixed = _find_nested_summary(rows, "Total Fixed Assets")
211:     total_other_assets = _find_nested_summary(rows, "Total Other Assets")
212: 
213:     inventory = _find_nested_value(rows, "Inventory")
214:     credit_card = _find_nested_value(rows, "Credit Card")
215:     payroll_liab = _find_nested_value(rows, "Payroll Liabilities")
216:     current_debt = _find_nested_value(rows, "Current Portion")
217:     long_term = _find_nested_summary(rows, "Total Long-Term Liabilities")
218:     accum_depr = _find_nested_value(rows, "Accumulated Depreciation")
219:     owners_eq = _find_nested_value(rows, "Owner's Equity")
220:     retained = _find_nested_value(rows, "Retained Earnings")
221:     net_inc_eq = _find_nested_value(rows, "Net Income")
222: 
223:     current_ratio = round(total_current_assets / total_current_liabilities, 2) if total_current_liabilities else 0
224:     dte = round(total_liabilities / total_equity, 2) if total_equity else 0
225:     working_cap = total_current_assets - total_current_liabilities
226: 
227:     return BalanceSheetData(
228:         as_of_date=header.get("EndPeriod", ""),
229:         cash_and_bank=cash,
230:         accounts_receivable=ar,
231:         inventory=inventory,
232:         other_current_assets=total_current_assets - cash - ar - inventory,
233:         total_current_assets=total_current_assets,
234:         fixed_assets_gross=total_fixed - accum_depr if accum_depr < 0 else total_fixed + abs(accum_depr),
235:         accumulated_depreciation=accum_depr,
236:         total_fixed_assets=total_fixed,
237:         other_assets=total_other_assets,
238:         total_assets=total_assets,
239:         accounts_payable=ap,
240:         credit_card_payable=credit_card,
241:         payroll_liabilities=payroll_liab,
242:         current_debt_portion=current_debt,
243:         other_current_liabilities=total_current_liabilities - ap - credit_card - payroll_liab - current_debt,
244:         total_current_liabilities=total_current_liabilities,
245:         long_term_debt=long_term,
246:         total_long_term_liabilities=long_term,
247:         total_liabilities=total_liabilities,
248:         owners_equity=owners_eq,
249:         retained_earnings=retained,
250:         net_income_equity=net_inc_eq,
251:         total_equity=total_equity,
252:         current_ratio=current_ratio,
253:         debt_to_equity=dte,
254:         working_capital=working_cap,
255:     )
256:

258: def parse_cash_flow(raw: dict[str, Any]) -> CashFlowData:
259:     rows = raw.get("Rows", {}).get("Row", [])
260:     header = raw.get("Header", {})
261: 
262:     operating = _find_summary_value(rows, "OperatingActivities")
263:     investing = _find_summary_value(rows, "InvestingActivities")
264:     financing = _find_summary_value(rows, "FinancingActivities")
265:     net_change = _find_summary_value(rows, "NetCashChange")
266:     cash_begin = _find_summary_value(rows, "CashBeginning")
267:     cash_end = _find_summary_value(rows, "CashEnding")
268: 
269:     def _find_cf_line(group: str, label_contains: str) -> float:
270:         section = _find_section(rows, group)
271:         if not section:
272:             return 0.0
273:         for r in _extract_data_rows(section):
274:             cd = r.get("ColData", [])
275:             if cd and label_contains.lower() in cd[0].get("value", "").lower():
276:                 return _safe_float(cd[-1].get("value", "0"))
277:         return 0.0
278: 
279:     depreciation = _find_cf_line("OperatingActivities", "Depreciation")
280:     capex = abs(_find_cf_line("InvestingActivities", "Equipment")) + abs(_find_cf_line("InvestingActivities", "Leasehold")) + abs(_find_cf_line("InvestingActivities", "Computer"))
281:     debt_repay = abs(_find_cf_line("FinancingActivities", "Loan Repayment")) + abs(_find_cf_line("FinancingActivities", "SBA")) + abs(_find_cf_line("FinancingActivities", "Equipment Loan"))
282:     distributions = abs(_find_cf_line("FinancingActivities", "Distribution"))
283: 
284:     return CashFlowData(
285:         start_date=header.get("StartPeriod", ""),
286:         end_date=header.get("EndPeriod", ""),
287:         operating_cash_flow=operating,
288:         investing_cash_flow=investing,
289:         financing_cash_flow=financing,
290:         net_cash_change=net_change,
291:         cash_beginning=cash_begin,
292:         cash_ending=cash_end,
293:         depreciation=depreciation,
294:         capex=capex,
295:         debt_repayment=debt_repay,
296:         owner_distributions=distributions,
297:     )
298: 
299: 
300: def parse_aging(raw: dict[str, Any], report_type: str) -> AgingData:
301:     header = raw.get("Header", {})
302:     data_rows = raw.get("Rows", {}).get("Row", [])
303:     summary = raw.get("Rows", {}).get("Summary", {})
304: 
305:     items: list[AgingBucket] = []
306:     for row in data_rows:
307:         if row.get("type") != "Data":
308:             continue
309:         cd = row.get("ColData", [])
310:         if len(cd) < 7:
311:             continue
312:         items.append(AgingBucket(
313:             name=cd[0].get("value", ""),
314:             current=_safe_float(cd[1].get("value")),
315:             days_1_30=_safe_float(cd[2].get("value")),
316:             days_31_60=_safe_float(cd[3].get("value")),
317:             days_61_90=_safe_float(cd[4].get("value")),
318:             days_91_plus=_safe_float(cd[5].get("value")),
319:             total=_safe_float(cd[6].get("value")),
320:         ))
321: 
322:     summary_cd = summary.get("ColData", [])
323:     t_current = _safe_float(summary_cd[1].get("value")) if len(summary_cd) > 1 else 0
324:     t_1_30 = _safe_float(summary_cd[2].get("value")) if len(summary_cd) > 2 else 0
325:     t_31_60 = _safe_float(summary_cd[3].get("value")) if len(summary_cd) > 3 else 0
326:     t_61_90 = _safe_float(summary_cd[4].get("value")) if len(summary_cd) > 4 else 0
327:     t_91 = _safe_float(summary_cd[5].get("value")) if len(summary_cd) > 5 else 0
328:     total = _safe_float(summary_cd[6].get("value")) if len(summary_cd) > 6 else 0
329: 
330:     pct_current = round((t_current / total * 100), 1) if total else 0
331:     pct_overdue = round(100 - pct_current, 1) if total else 0
332: 
333:     weighted_days = (
334:         t_current * 0 + t_1_30 * 15 + t_31_60 * 45 + t_61_90 * 75 + t_91 * 120
335:     )
336:     avg_days = round(weighted_days / total, 1) if total else 0
337: 
338:     return AgingData(
339:         report_type=report_type,
340:         as_of_date=header.get("EndPeriod", ""),
341:         line_items=items,
342:         total_current=t_current,
343:         total_1_30=t_1_30,
344:         total_31_60=t_31_60,
345:         total_61_90=t_61_90,
346:         total_91_plus=t_91,
347:         total=total,
348:         pct_current=pct_current,
349:         pct_overdue=pct_overdue,
350:         avg_days_outstanding=avg_days,
351:     )
352: 
353: 
354: def parse_company_info(raw: dict[str, Any]) -> CompanyProfile:
355:     if not raw:
356:         return CompanyProfile()
357:     # Stored company_info doc: { "CompanyInfo": { "CompanyStartDate": "2026-03-03", ... }, "time": "..." }
358:     ci = raw.get("CompanyInfo") if isinstance(raw.get("CompanyInfo"), dict) else raw
359:     if not ci:
360:         return CompanyProfile()
361:     addr = ci.get("CompanyAddr", {}) if isinstance(ci.get("CompanyAddr"), dict) else {}
362: 
363:     industry = ""
364:     company_type = ""
365:     for nv in ci.get("NameValue", []) or []:
366:         if not isinstance(nv, dict):
367:             continue
368:         if nv.get("Name") == "QBOIndustryType":
369:             industry = nv.get("Value", "") or ""
370:         if nv.get("Name") == "CompanyType":
371:             company_type = nv.get("Value", "") or ""
372: 
373:     # Intuit returns "CompanyStartDate" (e.g. "2026-03-03"); some docs use "StartDate"
374:     start_date_val = ci.get("CompanyStartDate") or ci.get("StartDate")
375:     start_date = str(start_date_val).strip() if start_date_val is not None else ""
376: 
377:     return CompanyProfile(
378:         company_name=ci.get("CompanyName", ""),
379:         legal_name=ci.get("LegalName", ""),
380:         address=addr.get("Line1", ""),
381:         city=addr.get("City", ""),
382:         state=addr.get("CountrySubDivisionCode", ""),
383:         zip=addr.get("PostalCode", ""),
384:         country=addr.get("Country", ci.get("Country", "")),
385:         phone=ci.get("PrimaryPhone", {}).get("FreeFormNumber", ""),
386:         email=ci.get("Email", {}).get("Address", ""),
387:         website=ci.get("WebAddr", {}).get("URI", ""),
388:         industry=industry,
389:         company_type=company_type,
390:         start_date=start_date,
391:         fiscal_year_start=ci.get("FiscalYearStartMonth", ""),
392:     )
393: 
394: 
395: def _compute_seasonality(monthly_income: list[float], month_names: list[str]) -> SeasonalityAnalysis | None:
396:     if len(monthly_income) < 6:
397:         return None
398: 
399:     avg = statistics.mean(monthly_income) if monthly_income else 0
400:     if avg == 0:
401:         return None
402: 
403:     indexed = list(zip(month_names, monthly_income))
404:     indexed_sorted = sorted(indexed, key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)
405: 
406:     peak = indexed_sorted[:3]
407:     trough = indexed_sorted[-3:]
408: 
409:     peak_avg = statistics.mean([p[1] for p in peak])
410:     trough_avg = statistics.mean([t[1] for t in trough])
411: 
412:     ratio = round(peak_avg / trough_avg, 2) if trough_avg > 0 else 0
413: 
414:     if ratio > 2.0:
415:         risk = "high"
416:     elif ratio > 1.5:
417:         risk = "moderate"
418:     else:
419:         risk = "low"
420: 
421:     return SeasonalityAnalysis(
422:         peak_months=[p[0] for p in peak],
423:         trough_months=[t[0] for t in trough],
424:         peak_avg_revenue=round(peak_avg, 2),
425:         trough_avg_revenue=round(trough_avg, 2),
426:         seasonality_ratio=ratio,
427:         seasonal_risk=risk,
428:     )
429: 
430: 
431: # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
432: # Main compute function
433: # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
434: 
435: 
436: def compute_qb_analytics(
437:     reports: dict[str, dict[str, Any]],
438:     smb_id: str,
439: ) -> QBAnalyticsResult:
440:     """
441:     Compute full QB analytics from stored report JSONs.
442: 
443:     `reports` is a dict keyed by report_type:
444:       "profit_and_loss", "profit_and_loss_prior", "balance_sheet",
445:       "cash_flow", "ar_aging", "ap_aging", "company_info"
446:     """
447:     pl = parse_profit_and_loss(reports.get("profit_and_loss", {}))
448:     bs = parse_balance_sheet(reports.get("balance_sheet", {}))
449:     cf = parse_cash_flow(reports.get("cash_flow", {}))
450: 
451:     ar = parse_aging(reports["ar_aging"], "receivables") if "ar_aging" in reports else None
452:     ap = parse_aging(reports["ap_aging"], "payables") if "ap_aging" in reports else None
453:     company = parse_company_info(reports.get("company_info", {}))
454: 
455:     # YoY growth
456:     prior_pl = reports.get("profit_and_loss_prior", {})
457:     prior_revenue = 0.0
458:     if prior_pl:
459:         prior_rows = prior_pl.get("Rows", {}).get("Row", [])
460:         prior_revenue = _find_summary_value(prior_rows, "Income")
461: 
462:     revenue_growth = None
463:     if prior_revenue > 0 and pl.total_income > 0:
464:         revenue_growth = round(((pl.total_income - prior_revenue) / prior_revenue) * 100, 1)
465: 
466:     # Monthly burn rate
467:     num_months = len(pl.months) or 12
468:     burn_rate = round(pl.total_expenses / num_months, 2) if pl.total_expenses else 0
469: 
470:     # Runway
471:     runway = round(bs.cash_and_bank / burn_rate, 1) if burn_rate > 0 else 99
472: 
473:     # DSCR
474:     interest_expense = 0
475:     for line in pl.expense_lines:
476:         if "interest" in line.name.lower():
477:             interest_expense = line.total
478:             break
479: 
480:     annual_debt_service = cf.debt_repayment + interest_expense
481:     dscr = None
482:     if annual_debt_service > 0:
483:         dscr = round((pl.net_income + cf.depreciation + interest_expense) / annual_debt_service, 2)
484: 
485:     # Seasonality
486:     seasonality = _compute_seasonality(pl.monthly_income, pl.months)
487: 
488:     return QBAnalyticsResult(
489:         smb_id=smb_id,
490:         company=company,
491:         income_statement=pl,
492:         balance_sheet=bs,
493:         cash_flow=cf,
494:         ar_aging=ar,
495:         ap_aging=ap,
496:         seasonality=seasonality,
497:         revenue=pl.total_income,
498:         cogs=pl.total_cogs,
499:         gross_profit=pl.gross_profit,
500:         operating_expenses=pl.total_expenses,
501:         net_income=pl.net_income,
502:         total_assets=bs.total_assets,
503:         total_liabilities=bs.total_liabilities,
504:         equity=bs.total_equity,
505:         cash_on_hand=bs.cash_and_bank,
506:         accounts_receivable=bs.accounts_receivable,
507:         accounts_payable=bs.accounts_payable,
508:         monthly_burn_rate=burn_rate,
509:         revenue_growth_yoy=revenue_growth,
510:         profit_margin=pl.profit_margin_pct,
511:         current_ratio=bs.current_ratio,
512:         debt_to_equity=bs.debt_to_equity,
513:         runway_months=runway,
514:         dscr=dscr,
515:     )
516: 
517: 
518: class QuickBooksAnalyticsService:
519:     """
520:     Service to fetch raw QB data from MongoDB and compute analytics.

<type>file</type>
<content>
1: """
2: Plaid Bank Analytics Service.
3: 
4: Parses raw Plaid /transactions/get JSON from MongoDB and computes
5: structured bank analytics for the dashboard.
6: 
7: KEY DESIGN PRINCIPLES:
8:   - Plaid amount convention: positive = outflow (spending), negative = inflow (income)
9:   - personal_finance_category.primary/detailed are the authoritative category fields
10:   - Transaction categorization is done by Plaid, NOT the LLM
11: 
12: Uses Beanie ODM (not raw Motor) for all database queries — consistent
13: with the project-wide database pattern in agent.core.database.
14: """
15: from __future__ import annotations
16: 
17: import logging
18: import statistics
19: from collections import defaultdict
20: from datetime import datetime
21: from typing import Any, Callable, Optional
22: 
23: from agent.analytics.models.plaid import (
24:     AccountSummary,
25:     CashFlowMetrics,
26:     CategoryBreakdown,
27:     IncomeSource,
28:     MonthlyCashFlow,
29:     PlaidAnalyticsResult,
30:     PlaidDataDocument,
31:     PlaidTransactionsResponse,
32:     RiskFlags,
33: )
34: from agent.plaid.models import PlaidAccount, PlaidItem, PlaidItemStatus, PlaidTransaction
35: 
36: logger = logging.getLogger("loangen-plaid-analytics")
37: 
38: RISK_CATEGORIES = {
39:     "ENTERTAINMENT_CASINOS_AND_GAMBLING",
40: }
41: 
42: INCOME_PRIMARIES = {"INCOME", "TRANSFER_IN"}
43: 
44: EXPENSE_PRIMARIES = {
45:     "BANK_FEES", "ENTERTAINMENT", "FOOD_AND_DRINK", "GENERAL_MERCHANDISE",
46:     "HOME_IMPROVEMENT", "MEDICAL", "PERSONAL_CARE", "GENERAL_SERVICES",
47:     "GOVERNMENT_AND_NON_PROFIT", "TRANSPORTATION", "TRAVEL",
48:     "RENT_AND_UTILITIES", "LOAN_PAYMENTS", "TRANSFER_OUT",
49: }
50: 
51: 
52: def _parse_month(date_str: str) -> str:
53:     return date_str[:7] if len(date_str) >= 7 else date_str
54: 
55: 
56: def _compute_volatility(values: list[float]) -> float:
57:     if len(values) <= 2:
58:         return 0.0
59:     mean = statistics.mean(values)
60:     if mean == 0:
61:         return 0.0
62:     return round((statistics.stdev(values) / abs(mean)) * 100, 1)
63: 
64: 
65: def compute_plaid_analytics(raw_json: dict[str, Any], smb_id: str) -> PlaidAnalyticsResult:
66:     """Compute full bank analytics from a raw Plaid transactions/get response."""
67:     response = PlaidTransactionsResponse.model_validate(raw_json)
68: 
69:     # --- Accounts ---
70:     accounts: list[AccountSummary] = []
71:     total_balance = 0.0
72:     total_available = 0.0
73:     type_counts: dict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)
74: 
75:     for acc in response.accounts:
76:         current = acc.balances.current or 0
77:         available = acc.balances.available or 0
78:         limit = acc.balances.limit
79: 
80:         util = None
81:         if limit and limit > 0 and acc.type == "credit":
82:             util = round(((limit - available) / limit) * 100, 1)
83: 
84:         accounts.append(AccountSummary(
85:             account_id=acc.account_id,
86:             name=acc.name,
87:             official_name=acc.official_name or "",
88:             type=acc.type,
89:             subtype=acc.subtype or "",
90:             institution=response.item.institution_name if response.item else "",
91:             current_balance=current,
92:             available_balance=available,
93:             credit_limit=limit,
94:             utilization_pct=util,
95:         ))
96: 
97:         if acc.type == "depository":
98:             total_balance += current
99:             total_available += available
100:         type_counts[acc.type] += 1
101: 
102:     # --- Transactions by month ---
103:     monthly_inflows: dict[str, float] = defaultdict(float)
104:     monthly_outflows: dict[str, float] = defaultdict(float)
105:     monthly_inflow_count: dict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)
106:     monthly_outflow_count: dict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)
107:     monthly_largest_in: dict[str, float] = defaultdict(float)
108:     monthly_largest_out: dict[str, float] = defaultdict(float)
109: 
110:     expense_by_primary: dict[str, float] = defaultdict(float)
111:     expense_by_primary_count: dict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)
112:     income_by_primary: dict[str, float] = defaultdict(float)
113:     income_by_primary_count: dict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)
114:     merchants_by_primary: dict[str, list[str]] = defaultdict(list)
115: 
116:     income_sources: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = {}
117:     risk_gambling = 0
118:     risk_loan_count = 0
119:     risk_loan_total = 0.0
120:     risk_fees = 0
121: 
122:     all_dates: list[str] = []
123: 
124:     for txn in response.transactions:
125:         if txn.pending:
126:             continue
127: 
128:         month = _parse_month(txn.date)
129:         all_dates.append(txn.date)
130:         amount = txn.amount
131:         primary = txn.personal_finance_category.primary if txn.personal_finance_category else ""
132:         detailed = txn.personal_finance_category.detailed if txn.personal_finance_category else ""
133:         merchant = txn.merchant_name or txn.name or "Unknown"
134: 
135:         if amount < 0:
136:             inflow = abs(amount)
137:             monthly_inflows[month] += inflow
138:             monthly_inflow_count[month] += 1
139:             monthly_largest_in[month] = max(monthly_largest_in[month], inflow)
140: 
141:             cat = primary if primary else "OTHER_INCOME"
142:             income_by_primary[cat] += inflow
143:             income_by_primary_count[cat] += 1
144: 
145:             source_key = f"{detailed}_{merchant}"
146:             if source_key not in income_sources:
147:                 income_sources[source_key] = {
148:                     "description": merchant,
149:                     "category": detailed or primary,
150:                     "total": 0.0,
151:                     "count": 0,
152:                 }
153:             income_sources[source_key]["total"] += inflow
154:             income_sources[source_key]["count"] += 1
155:         else:
156:             monthly_outflows[month] += amount
157:             monthly_outflow_count[month] += 1
158:             monthly_largest_out[month] = max(monthly_largest_out[month], amount)
159: 
160:             cat = primary if primary else "OTHER_EXPENSE"
161:             expense_by_primary[cat] += amount
162:             expense_by_primary_count[cat] += 1
163:             if merchant and merchant not in merchants_by_primary.get(cat, []):
164:                 merchants_by_primary[cat].append(merchant)
165: 
166:         if detailed in RISK_CATEGORIES:
167:             risk_gambling += 1
168:         if primary == "LOAN_PAYMENTS":
169:             risk_loan_count += 1
170:             risk_loan_total += abs(amount)
171:         if primary == "BANK_FEES":
172:             risk_fees += 1
173: 
174:     # --- Monthly cash flows ---
175:     all_months = sorted(set(
176:         list(monthly_inflows.keys()) + list(monthly_outflows.keys())
177:     ))
178: 
179:     monthly_cash_flows: list[MonthlyCashFlow] = []
180:     running_balance = total_balance
181:     for m in all_months:
182:         inflow = monthly_inflows.get(m, 0)
183:         outflow = monthly_outflows.get(m, 0)
184:         net = inflow - outflow
185:         running_balance += net
186:         monthly_cash_flows.append(MonthlyCashFlow(
187:             month=m,
188:             total_inflows=round(inflow, 2),
189:             total_outflows=round(outflow, 2),
190:             net_cash_flow=round(net, 2),
191:             inflow_count=monthly_inflow_count.get(m, 0),
192:             outflow_count=monthly_outflow_count.get(m, 0),
193:             largest_inflow=round(monthly_largest_in.get(m, 0), 2),
194:             largest_outflow=round(monthly_largest_out.get(m, 0), 2),
195:             ending_balance_estimate=round(running_balance, 2),
196:         ))
197: 
198:     # --- Cash flow metrics ---
199:     inflow_values = [monthly_inflows[m] for m in all_months if m in monthly_inflows]
200:     outflow_values = [monthly_outflows[m] for m in all_months if m in monthly_outflows]
201:     net_values = [monthly_inflows.get(m, 0) - monthly_outflows.get(m, 0) for m in all_months]
202: 
203:     avg_in = statistics.mean(inflow_values) if inflow_values else 0
204:     avg_out = statistics.mean(outflow_values) if outflow_values else 0
205:     avg_net = statistics.mean(net_values) if net_values else 0
206:     months_negative = sum(1 for n in net_values if n < 0)
207:     runway = round(total_balance / avg_out, 1) if avg_out > 0 else 99.0
208: 
209:     cash_flow_metrics = CashFlowMetrics(
210:         avg_monthly_inflow=round(avg_in, 2),
211:         avg_monthly_outflow=round(avg_out, 2),
212:         avg_monthly_net=round(avg_net, 2),
213:         inflow_volatility_pct=_compute_volatility(inflow_values),
214:         outflow_volatility_pct=_compute_volatility(outflow_values),
215:         estimated_monthly_burn=round(avg_out, 2),
216:         runway_months=runway,
217:         months_with_negative_flow=months_negative,
218:     )
219: 
220:     # --- Expense categories ---
221:     total_expenses = sum(expense_by_primary.values()) or 1
222:     expense_categories = sorted([
223:         CategoryBreakdown(
224:             primary_category=cat,
225:             total_amount=round(amt, 2),
226:             transaction_count=expense_by_primary_count[cat],
227:             pct_of_total=round((amt / total_expenses) * 100, 1),
228:             top_merchants=merchants_by_primary.get(cat, [])[:5],
229:         )
230:         for cat, amt in expense_by_primary.items()
231:     ], key=lambda x: x.total_amount, reverse=True)
232: 
233:     # --- Income categories ---
234:     total_income = sum(income_by_primary.values()) or 1
235:     income_categories = sorted([
236:         CategoryBreakdown(
237:             primary_category=cat,
238:             total_amount=round(amt, 2),
239:             transaction_count=income_by_primary_count[cat],
240:             pct_of_total=round((amt / total_income) * 100, 1),
241:         )
242:         for cat, amt in income_by_primary.items()
243:     ], key=lambda x: x.total_amount, reverse=True)
244: 
245:     # --- Income sources ---
246:     num_months = len(all_months) or 1
247:     parsed_income_sources = sorted([
248:         IncomeSource(
249:             description=src["description"],
250:             category=src["category"],
251:             total_amount=round(src["total"], 2),
252:             avg_amount=round(src["total"] / src["count"], 2),
253:             transaction_count=src["count"],
254:             frequency="monthly" if src["count"] >= num_months * 0.8 else (
255:                 "recurring" if src["count"] >= 3 else "occasional"
256:             ),
257:         )
258:         for src in income_sources.values()
259:     ], key=lambda x: x.total_amount, reverse=True)
260: 
261:     # --- Risk flags ---
262:     balance_trend = [mcf.ending_balance_estimate for mcf in monthly_cash_flows]
263:     declining = len(balance_trend) >= 3 and all(
264:         balance_trend[i] < balance_trend[i - 1]
265:         for i in range(max(1, len(balance_trend) - 3), len(balance_trend))
266:     )
267: 
268:     high_util = any(
269:         (a.utilization_pct or 0) > 75 for a in accounts
270:     )
271: 
272:     risk_flags = RiskFlags(
273:         gambling_transactions=risk_gambling,
274:         loan_payment_count=risk_loan_count,
275:         loan_payment_total=round(risk_loan_total, 2),
276:         high_fee_count=risk_fees,
277:         declining_balance_trend=declining,
278:         high_utilization_credit=high_util,
279:     )
280: 
281:     # --- Cash flow score (0-100) ---
282:     score = 50
283:     if avg_net > 0:
284:         score += min(20, int(avg_net / 500))
285:     else:
286:         score -= min(20, int(abs(avg_net) / 500))
287: 
288:     if runway > 6:
289:         score += 15
290:     elif runway > 3:
291:         score += 8
292:     elif runway > 1:
293:         score += 0
294:     else:
295:         score -= 15
296: 
297:     if months_negative == 0:
298:         score += 10
299:     else:
300:         score -= months_negative * 3
301: 
302:     inflow_vol = cash_flow_metrics.inflow_volatility_pct
303:     if inflow_vol < 15:
304:         score += 5
305:     elif inflow_vol > 40:
306:         score -= 10
307: 
308:     if risk_gambling > 5:
309:         score -= 10
310:     if risk_fees > 3:
311:         score -= 5
312:     if declining:
313:         score -= 10
314:     if high_util:
315:         score -= 5
316: 
317:     score = max(0, min(100, score))
318: 
319:     if score >= 80:
320:         tier = "excellent"
321:     elif score >= 65:
322:         tier = "good"
323:     elif score >= 45:
324:         tier = "fair"
325:     elif score >= 25:
326:         tier = "poor"
327:     else:
328:         tier = "very_poor"
329: 
330:     # --- Date range ---
331:     sorted_dates = sorted(all_dates) if all_dates else ["", ""]
332: 
333:     return PlaidAnalyticsResult(
334:         smb_id=smb_id,
335:         institution_name=response.item.institution_name if response.item else "",
336:         data_date=datetime.utcnow().isoformat()[:10],
337:         accounts=accounts,
338:         total_balance=round(total_balance, 2),
339:         total_available=round(total_available, 2),
340:         account_count=len(accounts),
341:         account_types=dict(type_counts),
342:         monthly_cash_flows=monthly_cash_flows,
343:         cash_flow_metrics=cash_flow_metrics,
344:         expense_categories=expense_categories,
345:         income_categories=income_categories,
346:         income_sources=parsed_income_sources,
347:         risk_flags=risk_flags,
348:         cash_flow_score=score,
349:         cash_flow_tier=tier,
350:         total_transactions=len(response.transactions),
351:         date_range_start=sorted_dates[0],
352:         date_range_end=sorted_dates[-1],
353:     )
354: 
355: 
356: def _enumerate_months_inclusive(start_ym: str, end_ym: str) -> list[str]:
357:     """Return YYYY-MM strings from start through end inclusive."""
358:     if not start_ym or not end_ym or len(start_ym) < 7 or len(end_ym) < 7:
359:         return []
360:     y1, m1 = int(start_ym[:4]), int(start_ym[5:7])
361:     y2, m2 = int(end_ym[:4]), int(end_ym[5:7])
362:     out: list[str] = []
363:     y, m = y1, m1
364:     while (y, m) <= (y2, m2):
365:         out.append(f"{y:04d}-{m:02d}")
366:         m += 1
367:         if m > 12:
368:             m = 1
369:             y += 1
370:     return out
371: 
372: 
373: def _fixed_vs_discretionary_expense(primary: str) -> str:
374:     p = (primary or "").upper()
375:     if p in {"RENT_AND_UTILITIES", "LOAN_PAYMENTS"}:
376:         return "fixed"
377:     if p in EXPENSE_PRIMARIES and p not in {"RENT_AND_UTILITIES", "LOAN_PAYMENTS"}:
378:         # Heuristic: most other primaries treated as discretionary/mixed operational
379:         if p in {"BANK_FEES", "GOVERNMENT_AND_NON_PROFIT"}:
380:             return "fixed"

<content>
1: """
2: Credit Bureau Analytics Service.
3: 
4: Parses raw Array.com MISMO 2.4 JSON from MongoDB and computes
5: structured credit analytics for the dashboard.
6: 
7: KEY DESIGN PRINCIPLE:
8:   _FACTOR and _POSITIVE_FACTOR in the CREDIT_SCORE section are the single
9:   most important signals for understanding credit health. They explain
10:   exactly WHY the score is what it is and drive coaching recommendations.
11: 
12: Special values in Array.com CREDIT_SUMMARY data:
13:   -3  = Not enough information to compute
14:   -4  = No data available from bureau
15:   -5  = Not applicable for this bureau
16:   N/A = Not applicable
17:   ""  = No data
18: 
19: Uses Beanie ODM (not raw Motor) for all database queries — consistent
20: with the project-wide database pattern in agent.core.database.
21: """
22: from __future__ import annotations
23: 
24: import logging
25: from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone
26: from typing import Any, Callable, Optional
27:

79: def _safe_int(val: str | None, default: int | None = None) -> int | None:
80:     """Parse a CREDIT_SUMMARY value, returning None for special/missing values."""
81:     if val is None or val == "" or val == "N/A":
82:         return default
83:     try:
84:         v = int(val)
85:         if v in (-3, -4, -5):
86:             return default
87:         return v
88:     except (ValueError, TypeError):
89:         return default
90: 
91: 
92: def _safe_float(val: str | None, default: float | None = None) -> float | None:
93:     if val is None or val == "" or val == "N/A":
94:         return default
95:     try:
96:         v = float(val)
97:         if v in (-3.0, -4.0):
98:             return default
99:         return v
100:     except (ValueError, TypeError):
101:         return default

111: def _classify_risk_tier(score: int) -> tuple[str, str]:
112:     if score >= 800:
113:         return "excellent", "Exceptional credit — qualifies for best rates and terms"
114:     elif score >= 740:
115:         return "good", "Very good credit — strong qualification for most products"
116:     elif score >= 670:
117:         return "fair", "Good credit — qualifies for standard products, some premium"
118:     elif score >= 580:
119:         return "poor", "Fair credit — may need alternative or secured products"
120:     else:
121:         return "very_poor", "Poor credit — significant gaps to address before most products"

131:         text=factor.text,

151: def _filter_inquiries_last_2_years(
152:     inquiries: list[CreditInquiry],
153: ) -> list[CreditInquiry]:
154:     """Return only inquiries from the last 2 years, sorted newest first."""
155:     cutoff = datetime.now(timezone.utc) - timedelta(days=730)
156:     filtered = []
157:     for inq in inquiries:
158:         if not inq.date:
159:             continue
160:         try:
161:             inq_date = datetime.strptime(inq.date[:10], "%Y-%m-%d").replace(
162:                 tzinfo=timezone.utc
163:             )
164:             if inq_date >= cutoff:
165:                 filtered.append(inq)
166:         except (ValueError, IndexError):
167:             # Include if date is unparseable (better to show than hide)
168:             filtered.append(inq)
169:     # Sort newest first
170:     filtered.sort(key=lambda i: i.date, reverse=True)
171:     return filtered

174: def _count_raw_inquiries(raw_payload: dict[str, Any]) -> int:
175:     """Count CREDIT_INQUIRY records in raw Array payload."""
176:     src = raw_payload.get("CREDIT_RESPONSE", raw_payload)
177:     inquiries = src.get("CREDIT_INQUIRY")
178:     if isinstance(inquiries, list):
179:         return len(inquiries)
180:     if isinstance(inquiries, dict):
181:         return 1
182:     return 0

185: def _count_raw_payment_patterns(raw_payload: dict[str, Any]) -> tuple[int, int]:
186:     """
187:     Count tradelines with payment pattern data and start dates.
188: 
189:     Returns:
190:       (pattern_data_count, pattern_start_date_count)
191:     """
192:     src = raw_payload.get("CREDIT_RESPONSE", raw_payload)
193:     liabilities = src.get("CREDIT_LIABILITY")
194:     if isinstance(liabilities, dict):
195:         rows = [liabilities]
196:     elif isinstance(liabilities, list):
197:         rows = liabilities
198:     else:
199:         rows = []
200: 
201:     pattern_data_count = 0
202:     pattern_start_date_count = 0
203:     for row in rows:
204:         if not isinstance(row, dict):
205:             continue
206:         pattern = row.get("_PAYMENT_PATTERN")
207:         if not isinstance(pattern, dict):
208:             continue
209:         if pattern.get("@_Data"):
210:             pattern_data_count += 1
211:         if pattern.get("@_StartDate"):
212:             pattern_start_date_count += 1
213: 
214:     return pattern_data_count, pattern_start_date_count
215:

217: def _needs_detail_refresh(
218:     raw_payload: dict[str, Any],
219:     cached_result: CreditAnalyticsResult,
220: ) -> bool:
221:     """
222:     Detect stale pre-computed analysis that predates inquiry/account detail fields.
223:     """
224:     raw_inquiry_count = _count_raw_inquiries(raw_payload)
225:     cached_inquiry_count = len(cached_result.inquiries)
226:     if raw_inquiry_count > cached_inquiry_count:
227:         return True
228: 
229:     raw_pattern_count, raw_pattern_start_count = _count_raw_payment_patterns(raw_payload)
230:     cached_pattern_count = sum(
231:         1 for tl in cached_result.tradelines
232:         if (tl.payment_pattern_data or tl.payment_history)
233:     )
234:     cached_pattern_start_count = sum(
235:         1 for tl in cached_result.tradelines
236:         if tl.payment_pattern_start_date
237:     )
238: 
239:     if raw_pattern_count > cached_pattern_count:
240:         return True
241:     if raw_pattern_start_count > cached_pattern_start_count:
242:         return True
243: 
244:     return False

250:     unpaid = _safe_float(tl.unpaid_balance_amount)
251:     monthly = _safe_float(tl.monthly_payment_amount)
252: 
253:     utilization = None
254:     limit_basis = credit_limit if credit_limit and credit_limit > 0 else high_credit
255:     if limit_basis and limit_basis > 0 and unpaid is not None:
256:         utilization = round((unpaid / limit_basis) * 100, 1)
257: 
258:     payment_history = ""
259:     if tl.payment_pattern:
260:         payment_history = tl.payment_pattern.data
261: 
262:     late_30 = int(tl.late_count.days_30) if tl.late_count else 0
263:     late_60 = int(tl.late_count.days_60) if tl.late_count else 0
264:     late_90 = int(tl.late_count.days_90) if tl.late_count else 0
265: 
266:     return TradelineAnalysis(
267:         creditor_name=tl.creditor.name if tl.creditor else "Unknown",
268:         account_type=tl.account_type,
269:         loan_type=tl.credit_loan_type,
270:         status=tl.account_status_type,
271:         is_open=tl.is_closed != "Y",
272:         credit_limit=credit_limit,
273:         unpaid_balance=unpaid,
274:         monthly_payment=monthly,

301:         payment_pattern_data=tl.payment_pattern.data if tl.payment_pattern else "",
302:         payment_pattern_start_date=tl.payment_pattern.start_date if tl.payment_pattern else "",
303:     )
